Nic Pizzolatto has said he's come up with a story to reunite Cohle and Hart from the first season of 'True Detective'. One of the best series I've ever seen. The other (all excellent imho) seasons are already stuck in the shade of the first one, and I reckon trying again with same characters would be waaay too close but no cigar. Given the connection all 4 seasons have with each other, I'd love to see a final season where characters from all the seasons are brought together in some way or another.
